features.name: Follow-Up Email v2 — Quality + Demo Polish
Pipeline Real Deals Migration & Full Audit
Deal Copilot V2 — Intelligence, Memory & Actions
Edge Function Audit Phase 2 — Remaining ~380 Functions
Audit Fix Sprints — 50 P0 + 147 P1 Remediation

stories.title: Enrich analysis object with sentiment, key topics, and buying signals
acceptance: Meeting SELECT in generate-follow-up/index.ts includes sentiment_score, sentiment_reasoning, and summary_oneliner
Analysis object populates sentiment field from sentiment_score: positive (>0.5), neutral (-0.5 to 0.5), challenging (<-0.5)
Key topics extracted from summary via simple keyword extraction and populated in analysis.keyTopics
Buying signals extracted from summary (budget mentions, timeline confirmations, stakeholder buy-in) populated in analysis.buyingSignals
Composer prompt receives populated sentiment, keyTopics, and buyingSignals instead of empty defaults

stories.title: Add regenerate-with-guidance flow (backend + frontend)
acceptance: POST endpoint accepts optional regenerate_guidance string and cached_rag_context object
When guidance provided, re-composes email with same RAG context plus user instructions appended to prompt
Frontend shows text input modal when Regenerate button is clicked
Regenerated email replaces previous result with a 'Regenerated' badge
No re-query of RAG — uses cached context from first generation (saves credits and time)

stories.title: Render email as styled preview with subject header and signature
acceptance: Email result renders in a Card with email-client styling: To field, bold subject line, body with proper paragraphs
Signature (sender name) rendered in muted text below body, visually separated
Markdown-style formatting (bold with **, bullet lists) parsed and rendered as HTML
Links in email body rendered as clickable blue text
Word count shown below email in muted text

stories.title: Add inline email editor with edit/preview toggle
acceptance: Edit button on email preview switches to editable textarea for body and input for subject
Preview button returns to styled read-only view with edited content
Edited content persists in state — Copy button copies edited version
Cancel button reverts to original generated content
Edit state does not re-trigger generation

stories.title: Add Send to Slack approval button with preview block
acceptance: Send to Slack button on demo page calls generate-follow-up with delivery='slack'
Backend formats email as Slack Block Kit message with approve/edit/dismiss buttons
Sends to user's Slack DM channel via slack-events bot
UI shows confirmation toast: 'Sent to Slack for approval'
If Slack not connected, button is disabled with tooltip explaining setup

stories.title: Show actual RAG findings in context breakdown, not just counts
acceptance: Context breakdown expands to show actual findings: commitment text, concern keywords, commercial mentions
Each context category is collapsible with a chevron toggle
Collapsed state shows count badge, expanded shows 2-3 line summaries per category
Empty categories hidden (not shown as '0 found')
Backend SSE result event includes ragSummary object with category labels and snippet text

stories.title: Add step timing display and total generation time
acceptance: Each SSE step event includes durationMs field calculated from step start to complete
Frontend displays duration next to each completed step: 'Loading attendees (0.3s)'
Total generation time shown below all steps after completion
Steps that were skipped show 'skipped' instead of a duration
Running steps show elapsed time counter updating every 500ms

stories.title: Add quality degradation warnings in generation metadata
acceptance: SSE result event includes warnings array listing what degraded: missing writing style, no sentiment, RAG partial results, placeholder attendee
Each warning has a severity (info/warn) and human-readable message
Frontend renders warnings as amber badges below the context breakdown
Warnings are informational only — generation still completes
No warnings shown when all data sources returned successfully

stories.title: Delete seed deals from staging database
acceptance: All 8 seed deals (UUIDs 11111111-..through 88888888-..) deleted from staging deals table
Child records in deal_contacts and deal_health_scores cleaned up first
SELECT count(*) FROM deals WHERE id LIKE '11111111%' returns 0
Real deals unaffected — verified by count before/after

stories.title: Fix useDealStages select('*') to explicit columns
acceptance: useDealStages.ts select('*') replaced with explicit column list: id, name, color, order_position, default_probability
Pipeline stages render correctly after change
No TypeScript errors introduced

stories.title: Audit Kanban view — stages, drag-drop, counts
acceptance: All stages render including empty ones
Drag-drop between stages updates deal stage and persists
Stage counts and value totals update after drag-drop
Error rollback works when API fails

stories.title: Audit Table view — columns, sort, row click
acceptance: All columns render with real data (name, company, value, stage, health, close date)
Sort by column headers works correctly
Row click opens DealIntelligenceSheet with correct deal data
Empty state renders when no deals match filters

stories.title: Audit deal creation flow — DealForm create mode
acceptance: DealForm opens from 'New Deal' button and creates a deal successfully
Contact selection works (search, select from dropdown)
Revenue fields (one_off_revenue, monthly_mrr) compute value correctly
Company field has fallback when no email domain available
New deal appears in both Kanban and Table views

stories.title: Audit deal editing and wire onDelete handler
acceptance: Edit mode opens from DealIntelligenceSheet with pre-filled data
Edit saves correctly and updates pipeline views
onDelete handler wired from PipelineView through to DealForm
Delete confirmation dialog shown before deletion
Deleted deal removed from pipeline views immediately

stories.title: Audit filters and search across views
acceptance: Stage filter narrows deals in both Kanban and Table views
Health status filter works (Healthy, Warning, Critical, Stalled)
Risk level filter works correctly
Search by deal name and company filters in real-time
Clear filters resets all and shows full pipeline

stories.title: Audit DealIntelligenceSheet display
acceptance: SheetContent has !top-16 !h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] classes (already confirmed)
Health scores render correctly (Deal Health, Relationship Health, Ghost Risk)
Risk factors and signals display with real data
Copilot chat mode works with deal context
CRM sync status shows correctly

stories.title: Create materialize-crm-deals edge function
acceptance: Edge function reads unmaterialized deals from crm_deal_index
Maps name, amount→value, stage→stage_id (fuzzy match to deal_stages.name), close_date→expected_close_date
Resolves contact_crm_ids → contacts.id via crm_contact_index
Resolves company_crm_id → companies.id via crm_company_index
Sets is_materialized=true and materialized_deal_id on crm_deal_index record

stories.title: Wire materialization into hubspot-webhook
acceptance: After upsertDealIndex succeeds in hubspot-webhook, trigger materialization for the deal
Fix unpinned @supabase/supabase-js@2 import to @2.43.4
Replace legacyCorsHeaders with getCorsHeaders(req)
Materialized deal appears in deals table with correct stage and contacts

stories.title: Add deal support to attio-webhook
acceptance: attio-webhook handles deal.created and deal.updated events
Deal events call upsertDealIndex with correct Attio field mapping
After upsert, trigger materialization for the deal
Materialized deal appears in deals table

stories.title: Fix upsertCrmIndex.ts unpinned import
acceptance: supabase/functions/_shared/upsertCrmIndex.ts import changed from @2.39.3 to @2.43.4
Functions that use upsertCrmIndex still deploy and work correctly

stories.title: Add Import from CRM dropdown to Pipeline header
acceptance: Dropdown button next to 'New Deal' with HubSpot and Attio options
Only shows CRM options for connected integrations
Clicking option opens respective import wizard in deal mode
Uses Lucide icons for CRM logos

stories.title: Add deal import to HubSpot Import Wizard
acceptance: Object type selector added: Contacts | Deals
When Deals selected, shows CRM deals from crm_deal_index for selection
Selected deals imported via materialize-crm-deals edge function
Imported deals appear in pipeline after import completes
Progress feedback during import (loading state, success toast)

stories.title: Enhance Attio wizard for pipeline deal import
acceptance: When object type is 'deals', show 'Import to Pipeline' toggle
When toggled on, calls materialize-crm-deals instead of creating ops table
Imported deals appear in pipeline after import completes
Existing ops table import flow unaffected when toggle is off

stories.title: Verify ops table sync for deals
acceptance: Creating a deal populates the standard 'Deals' ops table
Changing deal stage updates the ops table cell
All 18 system columns populated correctly
CRM-imported deals also appear in ops table

stories.title: Verify contact and company linkage for CRM deals
acceptance: deal_contacts junction populated for CRM-imported deals
primary_contact_id and company_id set correctly on materialized deals
DealIntelligenceSheet shows linked contacts for imported deals

stories.title: Extend enrichment with meeting intelligence, overdue tasks, temperature, and email signals
acceptance: askMeeting() called in parallel with existing meetings/activities fetch during enrichment
Overdue tasks fetched: tasks where deal_id match, completed=false, due_date < now()
Deal temperature fetched from deal_signal_temperature table
Email signals fetched from email_signal_events (latest 3 per deal)
All fetches non-blocking — .catch(() => null) so greeting works if any fail
EnrichmentData interface extended with meetingIntelligence, overdueTasks, temperature, emailSignals

stories.title: Build proactive alerts and meeting intel into greeting
acceptance: Greeting includes meeting intelligence one-liner when available (e.g. 'Last discussed pricing on Feb 12')
Overdue tasks surfaced: '{count} overdue task(s) need attention'
Cold temperature flagged: 'Signal temperature is cold (18%)'
Declining trend flagged: 'Signals are declining'
Recent email signal surfaced for notable types (proposal_opened, positive_buying_signal)
Alerts render as markdown bullet list after the health line

stories.title: Render structured response cards in deal copilot chat
acceptance: Import CopilotResponse from @/components/copilot/CopilotResponse
Assistant messages check m.structuredResponse before rendering
Structured responses render CopilotResponse component instead of ReactMarkdown
Plain text responses still render as ReactMarkdown (fallback)
Dark theme (bg-gray-900 parent) doesn't break structured card styling

stories.title: Add deal_id column to copilot_conversations and create migration
acceptance: Migration adds deal_id UUID column to copilot_conversations referencing deals(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
Unique partial index on (user_id, deal_id) WHERE deal_id IS NOT NULL prevents duplicate deal sessions
Migration runs without errors on staging
Existing main sessions unaffected (deal_id is NULL for them)

stories.title: Add slash command dropdown to deal copilot input
acceptance: DEAL_SLASH_COMMANDS constant defines 11 commands with command, label, description, prompt
Typing / in empty input shows dropdown with all commands
Typing /fo filters to /followup only
Arrow Up/Down navigates highlighted item, Enter/Tab selects, Escape closes
Commands ending with ': ' fill input for user to complete (e.g. /objection)
Other commands send immediately on selection
Dropdown renders above input with dark theme styling (bg-gray-800, violet highlight)

stories.title: Add getDealSession to CopilotSessionService
acceptance: CopilotConversation type updated with deal_id?: string | null
getDealSession(userId, dealId, orgId?) method queries by user_id + deal_id
If no existing session, creates one with is_main_session: false and deal_id set
Uses maybeSingle() for safe lookup

stories.title: Add dealId option to useCopilotChat hook
acceptance: dealId?: string added to UseCopilotChatOptions interface
Session loading useEffect branches: dealId → getDealSession, else → getMainSession
options.dealId added to useEffect dependency array
isLoadingSession correctly reflects deal session loading state

stories.title: Wire deal copilot to use persistent per-deal sessions
acceptance: useDealCopilotChat passes persistSession: true and dealId: deal.id to useCopilotChat
On activate(), if chat.messages.length > 0 (persisted history), skip greeting injection
Closing and reopening the same deal shows previous conversation
Opening a different deal shows a separate conversation (no cross-contamination)
isLoadingSession passed through for loading state in UI

stories.title: Deploy migration and edge function to staging
acceptance: Migration pushed to staging: npx supabase db push --project-ref caerqjzvuerejfrdtygb
copilot-autonomous redeployed with --no-verify-jwt
Build succeeds: npx vite build with no errors

stories.title: End-to-end verification of all 5 features
acceptance: Open deal → greeting shows health + proactive alerts + meeting intel one-liner
Type / → dropdown with 11 commands, keyboard navigation works, Enter selects
Select /summary → response renders as structured card (not plain markdown)
Close sheet, reopen same deal → previous conversation preserved
Open different deal → fresh conversation, no cross-contamination

stories.title: Audit Batch 5: CRM Integration Infrastructure (OAuth, webhooks, token refresh, sync)
acceptance: All CRM OAuth flows audited: attio-*, bullhorn-*, hubspot-*, fathom-*, google-oauth-*, slack-oauth-*, justcall-oauth-*
Token refresh functions reviewed for secure storage and rotation
Webhook handlers reviewed for signature verification
CRM write-back functions reviewed: push-cell-to-*, push-to-*, crm-writeback-worker
Findings written to .sixty/audit-batch-5-findings.md with P0-P4 severity ratings

stories.title: Audit Batch 6: Billing, Credits, Onboarding & Account Management
acceptance: Billing functions audited: create-checkout-session, create-credit-checkout, credit-auto-topup, stripe-*, reconcile-billing
Credit system audited: admin-credit-menu, get-credit-*, check-credit-alerts, grant-welcome-credits, purge-credit-logs, meter-storage
Onboarding audited: initialize-onboarding, create-profile, create-users-from-profiles, invite-user, handle-*-joining
Account lifecycle audited: delete-user, delete-organization, clerk-user-sync (deprecated), restore-user
Findings written to .sixty/audit-batch-6-findings.md with P0-P4 severity ratings

stories.title: Audit Batch 7: Public REST API & Proxy Infrastructure
acceptance: All api-v1-* endpoints audited for auth, rate limiting, input validation
api-auth, api-proxy, api-monitor, api-monitor-notify reviewed
api-usage-alerts, api-usage-cron reviewed for cost control
api-skill-builder, api-skill-execute, api-sequence-execute reviewed
Findings written to .sixty/audit-batch-7-findings.md with P0-P4 severity ratings

stories.title: Audit Batch 8: Transcription Pipeline & Recording Infrastructure
acceptance: Multi-provider transcription audited: poll-gladia-jobs, poll-transcription-queue, process-gladia-webhook, process-transcription-callback
Recording infrastructure audited: upload-recording-to-s3, get-recording-url, proxy-fathom-video, deploy/stop-recording-bot
Voice system audited: voice-transcribe, voice-transcribe-poll, voice-upload, voice-audio-url, voice-presigned-url, voice-share*
Usage tracking audited: fetch-deepgram-usage, fetch-gladia-usage, fetch-meetingbaas-usage
Findings written to .sixty/audit-batch-8-findings.md with P0-P4 severity ratings

stories.title: Audit Batch 9: Enrichment Pipeline & Email Infrastructure
acceptance: Enrichment providers audited: ai-ark-*, apollo-*, explorium-*, deep-enrich-organization, enrich-*
Email infrastructure audited: email-send-as-rep, categorize-email, gmail-*, ms-graph-email, encharge-*
Transactional emails audited: first-meeting-synced-email, subscription-confirmed-email, org-approval-email, send-*-email
Email sync audited: scheduled-email-sync, scheduled-encharge-emails, scheduled-google-context-sync
Findings written to .sixty/audit-batch-9-findings.md with P0-P4 severity ratings

stories.title: Audit Batch 10: Agent Fleet & Specialized Agents
acceptance: Agent fleet audited: agent-config-admin, agent-crm-*, agent-deal-temperature, agent-email-signals, agent-engagement-patterns
Autonomous agents audited: agent-eod-synthesis, agent-morning-briefing, agent-org-learning, agent-pipeline-*, agent-reengagement
Autopilot system audited: autopilot-admin, autopilot-backfill, autopilot-evaluate, autopilot-record-signal
Process agents audited: process-ai-analysis, process-calendar-events, process-lead-prep, process-notification-queue, process-reengagement
Findings written to .sixty/audit-batch-10-findings.md with P0-P4 severity ratings

stories.title: Audit Batch 11: Calendar Integration & Slack Notification Ecosystem
acceptance: Calendar ecosystem audited: google-calendar*, calendar-search, calendar-sync, meetingbaas-*, savvycal-*, find-available-slots
Google workspace audited: google-docs*, google-drive, google-gmail, google-tasks, google-workspace-batch
Slack notifications audited: slack-deal-*, slack-email-reply-alert, slack-expire-actions, slack-interactive, slack-morning-brief
Slack infrastructure audited: slack-slash-commands, slack-task-reminders, route-message, send-slack-*, notification-triage
Findings written to .sixty/audit-batch-11-findings.md with P0-P4 severity ratings

stories.title: Audit Batch 12: Workflows, Analytics, Data Sync, Demo & Remaining Functions
acceptance: Workflows audited: evaluate-*, workflow-webhook, ops-workflow-orchestrator, task-auto-expire, task-signal-processor
Analytics audited: analytics-web-vitals, cloudinary-analytics, meeting-analytics*, account-monitor, account-signal-digest
Data sync audited: app-data-batch, bulk-import-activities, materialize-crm-deals, sync-profile-names, sync-recording-to-crm
Demo/test/misc audited: demo-*, test-*, health, heal-deal-links, entity-search, generate-embedding, sentry-*
Findings written to .sixty/audit-batch-12-findings.md with P0-P4 severity ratings

stories.title: Sprint 0: Fix shared auth infrastructure (edgeAuth.ts JWT bypass)
acceptance: edgeAuth.ts getAuthContext/authenticateRequest uses supabase.auth.getUser() ONLY — JWT fallback removed
isServiceRoleAuth() validates JWT signature before trusting role claim
debug-auth function deleted from staging and production
impersonate-user requires admin role + org membership (not anon key)
clerk-user-sync, fix-invitation-rls, fix-trigger deleted from all environments

stories.title: Sprint 0B: Delete test/debug functions from production
acceptance: 9 test functions deleted: test-hitl, test-slack-webhook, test-fathom-api, test-auth, test-no-auth, test-browserless-access, test-fathom-token, test-email-sequence, run-process-map-test
Functions removed from staging and production via supabase functions delete
No test-* functions remain deployed in production

stories.title: Sprint 1: Add auth to cron/worker functions (~30 functions)
acceptance: All cc-* functions (5) add verifyCronSecret() guard at entry
All process-* workers add verifyCronSecret() or isServiceRoleAuth()
Agent cron functions (agent-dead-letter-retry, agent-pipeline-snapshot, fleet-health) add cron secret
Proactive functions (proactive-pipeline-analysis, proactive-task-analysis, proactive-weekly-scorecard) add cron secret
Financial functions (credit-auto-topup, meter-storage, reconcile-billing) add cron secret

stories.title: Sprint 1B: Fix CRUD endpoint auth + body.userId bypasses
acceptance: deals/index.ts and contacts/index.ts add JWT validation + org scoping + explicit column select
handle-join-request-action uses JWT identity not body admin_user_id
generate-magic-link validates JWT not just checks header presence
execute-migration and run-migration add real auth (admin role required)
google-calendar-sync, find-available-slots, create-calendar-event use JWT identity not body.userId

stories.title: Sprint 2: Webhook verification + proxy lockdown + email auth
acceptance: process-gladia-webhook adds Gladia webhook signature verification
gmail-push-webhook adds Google Pub/Sub OIDC token verification
apify-run-webhook adds webhook secret validation
proxy-fathom-video, freepik-proxy, run-apify-actor add JWT auth
Email sending functions (send-organization-invitation, send-rejoin-invitation, send-waitlist-*, send-org-deactivation-email) add cron secret or service role auth

stories.title: Sprint 3: SDK pinning + CORS migration (batch fix ~110 functions)
acceptance: All @supabase/supabase-js@2 imports pinned to @2.43.4 (~60 functions + 4 shared modules)
All legacy corsHeaders replaced with getCorsHeaders(req) (~50 functions)
security.ts createErrorResponse() uses getCorsHeaders(req) not hardcoded wildcard
api-utils.ts uses getCorsHeaders(req) not legacy corsHeaders
All affected functions redeployed to staging with --no-verify-jwt

stories.title: Sprint 4: Agent budget enforcement + cost tracking
acceptance: agentRunner.ts creditsUsed counter incremented on each LLM call
agentConfig.ts budget_limit_daily_usd enforced — agents stopped when budget exceeded
logAICostEvent added to 11 agent functions making untracked LLM calls
rateLimiter.ts fails CLOSED on DB errors (not open)
agentSkillExecutor.ts sanitizes skill content before prompt injection into Claude

stories.title: Sprint 5: IDOR fixes, data safety, S3 expiry, .single() fixes
acceptance: cc-action-sync, cc-undo add org ownership check (not just JWT)
ops-table-ai-query, ops-table-transform-column, ops-table-insights-engine add table ownership check
get-recording-url, get-batch-signed-urls S3 expiry reduced from 7 days to 4 hours
.single() replaced with .maybeSingle() in 6+ locations (fetch-transcript, voice-audio-url, meetingbaas-connect-calendar, etc.)
Fail-open auth fixed in meeting-limit-warning-email, slack-snooze-check, slack-expire-actions

stories.title: Sprint 6: Architecture diagram corrections
acceptance: Model reference updated: Claude Haiku 4.5 -> Claude Sonnet 4.6
Transcription provider updated: AssemblyAI -> Railway WhisperX
Credit Governance V2 marked as planned/aspirational (not deployed)
Skills count updated: 30 -> 127, response panels: 48 -> 62
Security notes added reflecting actual auth posture post-fixes
